query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "redesign mixture-of-experts routers with manifold power iteration" computer science
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's question by investigating the same core mechanism (Mixture-of-Experts routing dynamics) and proposing a geometric/optimization-based alternative to standard routing losses, which aligns with the "Manifold Power Iteration" theme of the user's follow-up work. It satisfies criteria (a) and (d) as it provides foundational empirical and theoretical evidence on the geometric coupling in SMoE routers, a necessary baseline for any research extending or redesignin
